svg.text: Detailed Apache Flink Deployment on Kubernetes with HA & Durable Checkpoints
Ephemeral disk: RocksDB SST files for slots [0,1,4,5]
Ephemeral disk: RocksDB SST files for slots [2,3,6,7]
Durable state snapshots — survives Pod restarts. Incremental SST uploads.
_metadata file = atomic commit point for each checkpoint
Parallelism = 8 | 2 slots/TM | 4 TM Pods | 8 Kafka partitions (1:1 mapping)
All 4 operators chained in same slot → same thread → direct method calls, no serialization
Ephemeral disk lost on Pod death → restored from S3 checkpoint. Sources rewind to checkpointed Kafka offsets.
Increase parallelism → add TM Pods → savepoint → redistribute key groups across new slots
